meta.name: Chain-AskData short-term memory follow-up eval
meta.purpose: Validate short-term structured memory for multi-turn Text2SQL follow-up resolution before wiring memory into Feishu.
meta.source_questions: Derived from README demo questions and the 2026-07-22 project diary.

turn_assertion_policy.expected_resolved: Exact match for memory rewrite correctness.
turn_assertion_policy.expected_memory_used: Whether this turn should consume previous conversation state.
turn_assertion_policy.expected_selected_turn_id: The turn_id that should be inherited when memory is used.
turn_assertion_policy.required_sql_contains: All listed tokens should appear in the final SQL.
turn_assertion_policy.required_sql_any_of: At least one token group should be fully present in the final SQL.
turn_assertion_policy.forbidden_sql_contains: None of these tokens should appear in the final SQL.

priority_def.p0_current: Current short-term memory should pass these cases first.
priority_def.p1_next: Next iteration cases for semantic state patching beyond simple string replacement.

cases.base_demo_question: 最近30天北京奇迹胶原核销收入 TOP5门店
cases.purpose: Default third-turn follow-up should inherit the latest turn, not the first turn.

turns.question: 最近30天北京奇迹胶原核销收入 TOP5门店
turns.expected_resolved: 最近30天北京奇迹胶原核销收入 TOP5门店

turns.expected_resolved: 最近30天上海奇迹胶原核销收入 TOP5门店

turns.question: 那奇迹童颜呢
turns.expected_resolved: 最近30天上海奇迹童颜核销收入 TOP5门店
